title: petal-labs/iris
summary: Go SDK + CLI for building AI apps with a unified multi-provider LLM interface (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Ollama, HuggingFace, etc.), streaming, tool/function calling, secure key management, retries, and observability hooks.

title: sklaff2a-gif/promethee-nexus

Python/FastAPI/Ollama, single PC.

title: fugamante/cx
summary: Deterministic Rust-first LLM dev runtime: capture+budget, schema-validated JSON, quarantine/replay, tasks, telemetry.

summary: Autonomous Engineering

title: hydropix/TranslateBooksWithLLMs
summary: Translate full-length books and documents with Ollama, OpenAI (comptatible), Gemini, Mistral, Poe or OpenRouter. Preserves formatting. Resumes where you left off. No file size limits.
